# nothingmatters

> nothingmatters is a Korean handcrafted dessert brand focused on cookie favors, event snacks, group orders, and custom brownie cookie orders.

## Canonical site
- https://nothingmatters.co.kr/
- https://nothingmatters.co.kr/contact/
- https://nothingmatters.co.kr/guides/
- https://nothingmatters.co.kr/products/brownie-cookie/
- https://nothingmatters.co.kr/products/custom-brownie-cookie/
- https://nothingmatters.co.kr/products/handmade-cookie/
- https://nothingmatters.co.kr/products/lucky-cookie/
- https://nothingmatters.co.kr/products/scone/
- https://nothingmatters.co.kr/products/terminal-sand-cookie/
- https://nothingmatters.co.kr/guides/wedding-favor-cookie/
- https://nothingmatters.co.kr/guides/corporate-event-cookie/
- https://nothingmatters.co.kr/guides/teacher-snack-gift/
- https://nothingmatters.co.kr/guides/farewell-favor-cookie/
- https://nothingmatters.co.kr/guides/dessert-gift-set/
- https://nothingmatters.co.kr/guides/lucky-cheering-cookie/

## Business facts
- Brand name: nothingmatters
- Korean name: 낫띵메터스
- Contact phone: 010-2866-7976
- Contact email: eddiefactory@naver.com
- Pickup address: 서울특별시 성동구 상원12길 19 1층
- Fulfillment: in-store pickup or vehicle quick consultation
- Shipping: no general parcel shipping

## Main ordering use cases
- wedding favors
- corporate event snacks
- kindergarten or school birthday gifts
- retirement, promotion, and celebration gifts
- custom message dessert orders
- dessert gift sets and premium cookie gifts
- lucky or cheering cookie gifts

## Use-case guides
- guides/: guide hub for wedding favors, corporate event cookies, teacher snack gifts, farewell favors, dessert gift sets, and lucky cheering cookies
- wedding-favor-cookie: wedding favors, wedding cookie favors, neat favor packaging
- corporate-event-cookie: corporate event cookies, company favor cookies, office event snacks
- teacher-snack-gift: kindergarten teacher snacks, daycare snack gifts, light thank-you gifts
- farewell-favor-cookie: resignation favors, parental leave favors, promotion favors
- dessert-gift-set: baked gift sets, cookie gift sets, premium dessert gifts
- lucky-cheering-cookie: fortune cookies, cheering cookies, graduation or thank-you treats

## Product facts
- Brownie Cookie: basic order and custom order consultation available
- Custom Brownie Cookie: message sticker and design customization, minimum 12 for custom flow
- Handmade Cookie: seven flavors and multiple package options
- Bear Scone: plain or chocolate, minimum 12, strawberry jam option
- Fortune Cookie: four emotion themes for small gifts and support
- Terminal Sand Cookie: premium mood-forward gift line

## Inquiry essentials
- desired pickup date or event date
- approximate quantity
- product interest or package type
- intended use case
- whether pickup or quick delivery is needed
